data.name: Hentai Clicker: Vicky is streaming
data.detailed_description:
🎮 Welcome to Hentai Clicker: Vicky is streaming

Step into a city where rules are made to be bent.
Vicky, a confident and mischievous police officer, is live—and she knows exactly how to command attention. With her sharp gaze, flawless uniform, and teasing attitude, every click brings you closer to her playful side behind the badge.

Professional on the surface and delightfully naughty underneath, Vicky loves to test limits, tease suspects, and turn every interaction into a dangerous game of charm and authority. 🚓💙

🚨 About the Game

Hentai Clicker: Vicky is streaming blends addictive clicker gameplay with a flirty police-themed fantasy.
Each tap increases Vicky’s interest, unlocking new uniforms, stylish animations, and witty reactions that reveal her more daring personality.

Collect hearts to explore her world, progress through new stages, and discover what happens when the law meets temptation—all with a wink and a smile.

🎉 Features

🚓 Police-Themed Atmosphere – A stylish city setting with law-and-order vibes.
💙 Naughty Police Officer – Confident, playful, and full of attitude.
🖱️ Addictive Clicker Gameplay – Easy to play, hard to stop.
💗 Unlockable Outfits – From classic police uniforms to bold alternative looks.
🔊 Voice & Reactions – Teasing lines, playful laughs, and commanding charm.
🚀 Progression System – Stack hearts and uncover new sides of Vicky.

💖 Why You’ll Love It

If you enjoy confident characters, playful authority, and a touch of cheeky fantasy, Vicky is the perfect partner in crime.
She doesn’t just enforce the rules—she plays with them. And every click pulls you deeper into her game. 😏

🎮 How to Play

🖱️ Click to Collect Hearts – Each tap grabs the officer’s attention.
🔓 Unlock Outfits & Scenes – Spend hearts to reveal new looks and moments.
💥 Upgrade Skills – Boost progression and keep the action flowing.

🎉 Obey… or Don’t

She’s live.
She’s watching.
And she enjoys being in control.

Jump into Hentai Clicker: Vicky is streaming and see what happens when the law gets playful. 🚓✨

data.short_description: 🚓 Step into a cheeky police fantasy in Hentai Clicker: Vicky is streaming! Click to collect ❤️, unlock stylish police outfits, and enjoy a playful, addictive clicker experience with a naughty officer who loves to bend the rules. 😏
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 韓文, 日文, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 俄文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3 ou équivalent
  • 記憶體: 2 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Carte intégrée (Intel HD Graphics 3000)
  • 儲存空間: 200 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5 ou équivalent
  • 記憶體: 4 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GTX 560
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OS X 10.6
  • 處理器: Apple Silicon and Apple M1
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Intel HD Graphics 4000
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
mac_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OS X 10.11
  • 處理器: Apple Silicon and Apple M1
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: AMD Radeon R9 M370X
  • 儲存空間: 400 MB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 16.04
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Carte intégrée (Intel HD Graphics 3000)
  • 儲存空間: 200 MB 可用空間
linux_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 20.04
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GTX 560
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
